sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame
before_lines = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(len(before_lines)):
    if before_lines[i] != after_lines[i]:
        print("Row %d changed" % i)
        print("BEFORE: " + before_lines[i])
        print("AFTER:  " + after_lines[i])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game-tier": "initial state, no prior knowledge"}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
